title: Create evaluate.py — classification metrics and confusion matrix
acceptance_criteria: Loads trained models from train_classical.py and evaluates on held-out test set
Reports per-class precision, recall, and F1-score for both XGBoost and Random Forest
Generates and saves a confusion matrix plot to figures/confusion_matrix.png
Produces a per-class breakdown table printed to stdout
Macro and weighted F1 scores are calculated and displayed
